Name: Semaphore
Author: Semaphore
Description: Shows the Semaphore AI agent traffic light (green / yellow / red) on your Stream Deck keys.

Actions.Name: Semaphore Light
Actions.Tooltip: Shows the current Semaphore AI agent state on one key: green (idle), yellow (thinking), or red (writing files).

Actions.Name: Green Light
Actions.Tooltip: Lights up when the Semaphore agent is idle (green). Use three keys for a full traffic light.

Actions.Name: Yellow Light
Actions.Tooltip: Lights up when the Semaphore agent is thinking or running tools (yellow).

Actions.Name: Red Light
Actions.Tooltip: Lights up when the Semaphore agent is writing or editing files (red).
